column1: # Wisp partition layout for ESP32-C6 4 MB flash.
# Standard OTA-capable layout: two ~1.9 MB app slots (app0/app1) + small
# SPIFFS + coredump. The wisp does not gossip-OTA today (lamps do)
# leaving the dual-app layout in place means a future wisp self-OTA path
# (e.g. BLE-direct from the app) doesn't require a partition migration.
